criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence to enhance user experience.

criteria.name: User Base
criteria.description: The number of active users on the platform.

criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: Average time users spend on the app daily.

criteria.name: Privacy Measures
criteria.description: The robustness of the app's privacy and data protection policies.

criteria.name: Innovative Features
criteria.description: The presence of unique features that distinguish the app from competitors.
